sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32854" key="e)kruparo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκρῠπᾰρόω</orth>, perh. <sense id="n32854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reduce to ashes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:317" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">317</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
